title: Enchanter's Forge
description: Minecraft Mod that adds enchantments and a block to combine incompatible enchantments.
body:
# Enchanter's Forge
This Minecraft mod introduces 20 unique enchantments and a special block that allows players to combine enchantments that are normally incompatible. Enhance your gear with powerful new combinations and take your gameplay to the next level!

---------------------------

### New Block: Convergence Table
This new Block gives you the ability to combine normally incompatible enchantents.

--------------------------------

### Enchantments List:
| Enchantment   | Tool            | Level | Description                  |
|:-------------:|:---------------:|:-----:|:----------------------------:|
| Poison Aspect | Sword           | 2     | Inflicts Target with Poison  |
| Wither Aspect | Sword           | 2     |Inflicts Target with Wither   |
| Frost Aspect  | Sword           | 2     |Inflicts Target with Freeze   |
| Incinerate    | Armor           | 3     |Sets attacker on Fire         |
| Intoxicate    | Armor           | 3     |Inflicts attacker with Poison |
| Frostbite     | Armor           | 3     |Inflicts attacker with Wither |
| Ricochet | Bow/Crossbow/Trident | 3     | Arrows bounce of the ground  |
| Disarming     | Sword           | 5     | Target drops right hand item |
| Poseidons Call| Trident         | 1     |Thrown Trident instantly returns to inventory on hit|
| Waters Embrace| Trident         | 3     | Player heals when Trident is equipped in water|
| Vitality Boost| Armor           | 3     | Player gains more health     |
| Vampirism     | Sword           | 3     | Player heals when damaging enemies |
| Homing        | Bow/Crossbow/Trident| 1 | Arrows home towards enemies  |
| Soulbound     | any item        | 1     | Item is returned to player on death |
| Magnetism     | Armor           | 3     | Pulls nearby items toward the player|
| Step Assist   | Boots           | 1     | Player easily walks up blocks|
| Lava Walker   | Boots           | 2     | Lava turns into obsidian when stepped on|
| Decay         | Bow             | 1     | Inflicts Wither |
| Toxin         | Bow             | 1     | Inflicts Poison |
| Chill         | Bow             | 1     | Inflicts Frost |
